testcase.name: test_new_estate_has_encryption_salt
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:35: in admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please wait before trying again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_existing_estate_has_encryption_salt
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_encryption_upgrade.py:35: in admin_token assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"detail":"Too many requests. Please wait before trying again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
